task_groups.title: Implement workspace data model, validators, and schema initialization

subtasks.title: Define Workspace struct and implement slug, git_url, and branch validators
details: Create internal/workspace/model.go with Workspace struct: Slug, GitURL, Branch *string, OwnerID, OrgID *string, Status, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt string.
Create internal/workspace/validate.go implementing validateSlug(s string) error using regexp and manual checks.
Implement validateGitURL(url string) error: accept https://<host>/<path> and git@<host>:<path>; reject plain http://, empty host, empty path using regexp only.
Implement validateBranch(b string) error: reject empty string, ASCII control chars, space, ~, ^, :, ?, *, [, \, '..' sequences, trailing '.lock', trailing dot, leading dot in any component.
Export types following Go conventions; all validators return descriptive errors.

subtasks.title: Implement schema initialization
details: Create internal/workspace/schema.go implementing initSchema(db *apikit.DB) error.

Execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspaces with exact DDL from PRD: slug TEXT PRIMARY KEY, git_url TEXT NOT NULL, branch TEXT, owner_id TEXT NOT NULL, org_id TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL.
Return wrapped error if DB is nil or statement execution fails.
Call initSchema from the server boot sequence (cmd/af-hub/main.go) before MountHandlers.

subtasks.title: Implement workspace storage layer (insert, query, update, delete)
details: Create internal/workspace/store.go with Store struct wrapping *apikit.DB.
Implement Create(ctx, w *Workspace) error: INSERT with RFC3339 created_at/updated_at using time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339).
Implement GetBySlug(ctx, slug string) (*Workspace, error): SELECT; return nil, nil if not found.
Implement ListByOwner(ctx, ownerID string, includeArchived bool) ([]*Workspace, error): ORDER BY created_at DESC.
Implement ListAll(ctx, includeArchived bool) ([]*Workspace, error) for admin.
Implement UpdateStatus(ctx, slug, status string) (*Workspace, error): UPDATE status and updated_at.
Implement Delete(ctx, slug string) error: DELETE FROM workspaces WHERE slug = ?; return error if 0 rows affected.
Never write status='deleted'; deleted rows are physically removed.

checks: Unit tests for validators pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestValidate' -v
Schema tests pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestSchema' -v
Store tests pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestStore' -v
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/workspace/...
Requirements 01-REQ-1 (all ACs), 01-REQ-2 (all ACs) acceptance criteria met.

task_groups.title: Implement permission registration and access control middleware

subtasks.title: Register workspace permission scopes via MountHandlers
details: In internal/workspace/handler.go (or hub.go), define MountWorkspaceHandlers(s *apikit.Server, db *apikit.DB) error.
Call s.MountHandlers(db, apikit.Permission{Resource: "workspaces", Action: "read"}, apikit.Permission{Resource: "workspaces", Action: "create"}).
Register all six workspace routes on s.APIGroup() after MountHandlers succeeds.
Call MountWorkspaceHandlers from cmd/af-hub/main.go after initSchema.

subtasks.title: Implement workspace authorization middleware
details: Create internal/workspace/authz.go.
requireUserKey(next echo.HandlerFunc) echo.HandlerFunc: reject admin tokens with 403; require valid user identity; 401 if unauthenticated.
requireOwnerOrAdmin(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc middleware: fetch workspace by slug; return 404 if not found OR if credential is non-admin non-owner (slug enumeration prevention per 01-REQ-4.6).
requireOwnerOrAdminStrict: same but do NOT fall through to 404 for PATs — return 403 for PAT on lifecycle mutation endpoints.
checkScope(required string) middleware: inspect PAT scopes; return 403 if scope absent.
Implement per the access control matrix in PRD: admin cannot create; PATs cannot archive/reactivate/delete.

subtasks.title: Implement error response envelope helper
details: Create internal/workspace/errors.go.
Define apiError struct { Code int `json:"code"`; Message string `json:"message"` } and envelope struct { Error apiError `json:"error"` }.
Implement respondError(c echo.Context, status int, message string) error: return c.JSON(status, envelope{Error: apiError{Code: status, Message: message}}).
Use respondError consistently in all handlers; never return raw HTTP errors.

checks: Permission registration tests pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestPermission' -v
Access control tests pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestAuthz|TestScoping' -v
No linter warnings: go vet ./internal/workspace/...
Requirements 01-REQ-3.1, 01-REQ-3.2, 01-REQ-4 (all ACs), 01-REQ-18.1 acceptance criteria met.

task_groups.title: Implement API handlers: create, list, and get workspace

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/v1/workspaces handler
details: In internal/workspace/handler.go, implement createWorkspaceHandler(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc.
Parse JSON body into CreateWorkspaceRequest{Slug, GitURL, Branch *string, OrgID *string}; return 400 on parse error.
Validate slug, git_url, branch (if provided) using validators; return 400 with descriptive message on failure.
If OrgID provided: verify org exists (400 if not); verify user is member (403 if not).
Reject admin token: return 403. Reject PAT without workspaces:create: return 403.
Call store.Create; map UNIQUE constraint error to 409; map other DB errors to 500.
Return HTTP 201 with workspace JSON object.

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/workspaces handler
details: Implement listWorkspacesHandler(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc.
Parse ?include_archived=true query param.
If admin: call store.ListAll(ctx, includeArchived). Else: call store.ListByOwner(ctx, userID, includeArchived).
Return HTTP 200 with JSON array; return [] (not null) when no results.
No pagination headers or cursor fields; full result set returned.
Results ordered by created_at descending (enforced in store layer SQL).

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/v1/workspaces/:slug handler
details: Implement getWorkspaceHandler(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc.
Extract :slug path param; call store.GetBySlug(ctx, slug).
If workspace not found: return 404.
If workspace found but credential is non-admin non-owner: return 404 (not 403) to prevent enumeration.
If authorized: return HTTP 200 with workspace JSON object.

checks: Create workspace integration tests pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestCreate' -v
List and get workspace integration tests pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestList|TestGet' -v
All existing tests still pass: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./...
Requirements 01-REQ-5 (all ACs), 01-REQ-6 (all ACs), 01-REQ-7 (all ACs) acceptance criteria met.

task_groups.title: Implement API handlers: archive, reactivate, and delete workspace

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/archive handler
details: Implement archiveWorkspaceHandler(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc.
Extract :slug; apply requireOwnerOrAdmin middleware; return 404 if not found/accessible.
Reject PAT credentials (workspaces:read or workspaces:create) with 403.
Fetch current status; if status != 'active' return 400 with message 'workspace is already archived'.
Call store.UpdateStatus(ctx, slug, 'archived'); return HTTP 200 with updated workspace JSON.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/reactivate handler
details: Implement reactivateWorkspaceHandler(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc.
Extract :slug; apply requireOwnerOrAdmin middleware; return 404 if not found/accessible.
Reject PAT credentials with 403.
Fetch current status; if status != 'archived' return 400 with message 'workspace is not archived'.
Call store.UpdateStatus(ctx, slug, 'active'); return HTTP 200 with updated workspace JSON.

subtasks.title: Implement DELETE /api/v1/workspaces/:slug handler
details: Implement deleteWorkspaceHandler(store *Store) echo.HandlerFunc.
Extract :slug; apply requireOwnerOrAdmin middleware; return 404 if not found/accessible.
Reject PAT credentials with 403.
Fetch current status; if status != 'archived' return 400 ('only archived workspaces can be deleted').
Call store.Delete(ctx, slug); if DB error return 500.
Return HTTP 204 with empty body on success; do not write status='deleted'.

Property tests for delete-from-archived invariant pass: go test ./internal/workspace/... -count=1 -run 'TestProp' -v
All existing tests still pass: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./...

All tests pass: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./...

subtasks.title: Scaffold afc CLI command tree with apikit integration
details: Create cmd/afc/main.go: call apikit.RootCommand(); add workspace subcommand group; add LoginCmd, UserCmd, KeysCmd, TokensCmd, OrgsCmd, AdminCmd.
Execute via apikit.CLIExecute(); handle error with apikit.CLIPrintError(err); exit via os.Exit(apikit.CLIExitCode(err)).
os.Exit is called ONLY in main(); all library functions in internal/cli/ return (*T, error) — never os.Exit.
Create internal/cli/workspace.go with WorkspaceCmd() *cobra.Command returning the workspace subcommand tree.
Ensure go vet finds no os.Exit in internal/ or pkg/ source files.

subtasks.title: Implement afc workspace create and list commands
details: Implement createCmd: --git-url (required), --slug (required), --branch (optional), --org (optional slug).
If --git-url or --slug missing: print usage hint to stderr, exit 1, no API call.
If --org provided: resolve org slug to UUID; if resolution fails or returns null/malformed UUID, print error to stderr, exit 1, no workspace POST.
On success: POST /api/v1/workspaces; print workspace JSON to stdout; exit 0.
Implement listCmd: --include-archived flag passes ?include_archived=true; print JSON array to stdout; exit 0 on success, exit 1 on error (error to stderr).

subtasks.title: Implement afc workspace get, archive, reactivate, and delete commands
details: getCmd: GET /api/v1/workspaces/:slug; print JSON to stdout; exit 0 on success, exit 1 with error to stderr on failure.
archiveCmd: POST /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/archive; print JSON with status='archived' to stdout.
reactivateCmd: POST /api/v1/workspaces/:slug/reactivate; print JSON with status='active' to stdout.
deleteCmd: requires --confirm flag; if missing print usage hint to stderr, exit 1, no API call.
deleteCmd on success: print confirmation message to stderr, exit 0.
All commands: exit 1 with error to stderr on any API error; JSON to stdout, human messages to stderr.

subtasks.title: Implement org slug resolution for workspace create --org flag
details: Create internal/cli/orgresolve.go implementing resolveOrgSlug(ctx context.Context, slug string) (string, error).
Use apikit SDK or direct HTTP GET to look up org by slug; extract UUID.
If org not found (404) or API error: return non-nil error.
If response body missing/null UUID or unexpected shape: return non-nil error.
resolveOrgSlug never calls os.Exit; returns (*string, error) tuple.

CLI integration tests pass (with mock HTTP server): go test ./internal/cli/... -count=1 -run 'TestCLI' -v
afc --help lists workspace, login, user, keys, tokens, orgs, admin subcommands

task_groups.title: Wire up server bootstrap and health check

subtasks.title: Integrate schema init and workspace handlers into server boot sequence
details: In cmd/af-hub/main.go: call apikit.LoadConfig(), apikit.OpenDatabase(path), apikit.Bootstrap(ctx, db, opts).
Call initSchema(db); if error, log and return non-nil error causing process exit.
Call apikit.NewServer(cfg, dbHealthChecker{db}).
Call MountWorkspaceHandlers(s, db) which internally calls s.MountHandlers(db, workspacesReadPerm, workspacesCreatePerm).
Call s.Start(); propagate error to os.Exit.

subtasks.title: Implement HealthChecker via database ping
details: Create internal/health/checker.go implementing apikit.HealthChecker interface with a DB ping.
dbHealthChecker.Check(ctx) error: execute a trivial SQL (SELECT 1) against *apikit.DB; return error if ping fails.
Pass dbHealthChecker instance to apikit.NewServer(cfg, checker) in main.go.
Confirm existing main.go health check is replaced or aligned with this implementation.

initSchema is called before MountHandlers in boot sequence: inspect main.go call order
Health check returns nil on healthy DB and non-nil on unreachable DB: go test ./internal/health/... -count=1
All existing tests still pass: go test ./... -count=1
No linter warnings: go vet ./...

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration and smoke tests

subtasks.title: Trace execution paths and verify call chains are complete
details: Verify 01-PATH-1 (create workspace): main.go → MountWorkspaceHandlers → createWorkspaceHandler → store.Create → respondJSON; no stub remains.
Verify 01-PATH-2 (archive then delete): archiveWorkspaceHandler → store.UpdateStatus; deleteWorkspaceHandler → store.Delete; both call real DB, no panic("not implemented").
Search all .go files for panic("not implemented"): grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' . should return zero results.
Run TS-01-SMOKE-1: afc workspace create with real server; assert exit 0 and DB row present.
Run TS-01-SMOKE-2: afc workspace archive then delete; assert slug freed, no row remains.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation through handler and store layers
details: Confirm createWorkspaceHandler propagates store.Create error to respondError(c, 500, ...) not discarded.
Confirm archiveWorkspaceHandler propagates store.UpdateStatus (*Workspace, error) — both return values used.
Confirm deleteWorkspaceHandler propagates store.Delete error to 500 response.
Confirm list handler returns [] not null when store returns empty slice.
Run TS-01-SMOKE-3 (list with --include-archived) and TS-01-SMOKE-6 (reactivate): assert correct status transitions in JSON output.

subtasks.title: Run all smoke tests with real components
details: Run TS-01-SMOKE-4: create workspace with --org flag; verify org_id UUID in DB row.
Run TS-01-SMOKE-5: PAT workspaces:read reads only own workspaces; no other user's workspace visible.
All six smoke tests use real afc CLI binary, real af-hub server, real SQLite DB (test instance).
Confirm each smoke test exits 0 with correct JSON output and correct DB state after execution.
Run: go test ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -run 'TestSmoke' -v

subtasks.title: Stub and dead-code audit
details: Search for panic("not implemented"): grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' . — must return zero results.
Search for bare TODO stubs: grep -rn '// TODO' . — review each; none may be unimplemented required logic.
Search for os.Exit outside cmd/: grep -rn 'os.Exit' internal/ pkg/ — must return zero results.
Confirm all store methods (Create, GetBySlug, ListByOwner, ListAll, UpdateStatus, Delete) have real SQL implementations, not stubs.
Confirm resolveOrgSlug returns real data from apikit SDK or HTTP, not a hardcoded stub.
Run TS-01-71: source audit via go test confirming no os.Exit in library code.

subtasks.title: Verify call-site wiring for all production entry points
details: Confirm initSchema(db) is called in cmd/af-hub/main.go before server start (inspect AST or grep).
Confirm MountWorkspaceHandlers is called and its return error is checked in main.go.
Confirm WorkspaceCmd() is added to the cobra root command in cmd/afc/main.go.
Confirm apikit.CLIExecute(), apikit.CLIPrintError(), and apikit.CLIExitCode() are all called in cmd/afc/main.go — not just defined.

Confirm all six API routes (POST /workspaces, GET /workspaces, GET /workspaces/:slug, POST /:slug/archive, POST /:slug/reactivate, DELETE /:slug) are registered in MountWorkspaceHandlers and reachable from the live server.
Run full test suite: go test ./... -count=1 — all tests must pass.

checks: All smoke tests pass with real components: go test ./internal/integration/... -count=1 -run 'TestSmoke' -v
Full test suite passes: go test ./... -count=1
Zero panic("not implemented") stubs remain: grep -rn 'panic("not implemented")' . returns no output
Zero os.Exit calls outside cmd/: grep -rn 'os.Exit' internal/ pkg/ returns no output
No linter warnings: go vet ./...
All six HTTP routes respond correctly in integration: TS-01-SMOKE-1 through TS-01-SMOKE-6 all exit 0
Requirements 01-REQ-1 through 01-REQ-18 acceptance criteria all met as evidenced by passing test suite.
